name: Cai Yang
page_title: Cai Yang 蔡陽 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: When Liu Bei, at the time an officer under Yuan Shao, was sent to Runan with troops, he joined up with bandits led by Gong Du. Cao Cao sent Cai Yang against Liu Bei but Cai Yang was defeated and killed.
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Was not related to Qin Qi.
	Was not killed by Guan Yu, he was killed at Ru’nan.

full_text:
Cai Yang 蔡陽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cai Yang (蔡陽). Sent to take Runan from Liu Bei and Liu Pi but failed and was killed. Cai Yang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cai Yang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
When Liu Bei, at the time an officer under Yuan Shao, was sent to Runan with troops, he joined up with bandits led by Gong Du. Cao Cao sent Cai Yang against Liu Bei but Cai Yang was defeated and killed.
